title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out and about with Hishi
Akebono...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Awww! ♪ Those plushies are sooo cute!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's see... It says they're called "Cuties"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look where Hishi Akebono is pointing and see a
claw machine filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I bet it'd be really fun to win a bunch and then
surround myself with them! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I could cuddle them in bed when it's cold, and
chat with them when I'm bored... How buono! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The only thing is, I'm really bad with claw
machines.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I always try to go for the big prizes, but I can
never get them...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Really? You will? That'd be super buono! I'll cheer
you on, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
